free_text: Study of nuclei fission at lead slowing-down-time
In 41567 - new measurement, number of registered
events is about 3.3 times higher than in 41532.
Slowing down time in lead at
Proton beam of 209 MeV energy,50 Hz frequency,
Fast ionization fission chamber with layers of
Pu-239 nuclei admixture  14% relative to Cm-243 nuclei
Cm-243 c-s energy dependence was measured relative
N3, N3 - fission events time spectra for Cm-243 and
normalization and 2% uncertainty of Pu-239 c-s
Data presented on Fig.4-6 of Rep.JIA-1334,2012
Obtained by integration of c-s from E-MIN to E-MAX.
The resonance parameters from REL-REF of S.F.Mughabghab
were used as initial ones and to take into account
formalism was used. Energy range from 0.028 to 12.6 eV,
162 data points were used in analysis.
